ddls:
CREATE TABLE "genes" (
  "hgnc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gene from HGNC */,
  "uniprot_id" TEXT /* UniProt identifier for the corresponding protein */,
  "gene_name" TEXT /* Common name of the gene */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the gene function */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of gene (e.g., gene with protein product) */,
  "chromosome" TEXT /* The chromosome on which the gene is located */,
  "start_position" INTEGER /* The start position of the gene on the chromosome */,
  "end_position" INTEGER /* The end position of the gene on the chromosome */,
  "orientation" TEXT /* The orientation of the gene (e.g., + or -) */,
  "species" TEXT /* The species to which the gene belongs */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date and time when the gene record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The date and time when the gene record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hgnc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "proteins" (
  "uniprot_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the protein */,
  "protein_name" TEXT /* Common name of the protein */,
  "function" TEXT /* Function of the protein */,
  "molecular_weight" REAL /* Molecular weight of the protein (in Daltons) */,
  "sequence" TEXT /* Amino acid sequence of the protein */,
  "is_variant" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the protein is a variant of a reference protein */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date and time when the protein record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The date and time when the protein record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("uniprot_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gene_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., metabolic enzyme, structural protein) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date and time when the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The date and time when the category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_categories_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES gene_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gene_functions" (
  "function_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the function entry */,
  "hgnc_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the gene (hgnc_id) */,
  "function_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the gene's function */,
  "function_type" TEXT /* Type of function (e.g., enzymatic, regulatory) */,
  "evidence" TEXT /* Evidence supporting the function */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date and time when the function entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The date and time when the function entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("function_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_functions_hgnc_id FOREIGN KEY ("hgnc_id") REFERENCES genes ("hgnc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gene_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the interaction */,
  "gene1_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the first gene (hgnc_id) */,
  "gene2_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the second gene (hgnc_id) */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., activation, inhibition) */,
  "interaction_strength" REAL /* Strength of the interaction */,
  "evidence" TEXT /* Evidence supporting the interaction */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date and time when the interaction record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The date and time when the interaction record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_interactions_gene1_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene1_id") REFERENCES genes ("hgnc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_interactions_gene2_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene2_id") REFERENCES genes ("hgnc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data curator, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed version of the user's password */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* The date and time of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "hgnc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client used for access */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date and time when the access event was logged */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_hgnc_id FOREIGN KEY ("hgnc_id") REFERENCES genes ("hgnc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gene_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique version identifier */,
  "hgnc_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the gene (hgnc_id) */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the gene annotation */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date the version was last updated */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the changes in the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date and time when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The date and time when the version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_versions_hgnc_id FOREIGN KEY ("hgnc_id") REFERENCES genes ("hgnc_id")
)
